title: farrow
body:
[ArrowKT](https://arrow-kt.io/) for Fabric (& Quilt).

Farrow provides the JVM implementation of the following:
- arrow-annotations
- arrow-atomic
- arrow-continuations
- arrow-core
- arrow-core-serialization
- arrow-fx-coroutines
- arrow-fx-stm
- arrows-optics
- arrow-resilience

Visit the [API Docs](https://apidocs.arrow-kt.io/arrow-annotations/index.html)

Maven dependency:
```kotlin
val farrowVersion = "1.0.0+arrow.1.2.4" //latest version

repositories {
  //other stuff
  maven("https://maven.wiredtomato.net/releases/")
}

dependencies {
  //other stuff
  include(modImplementation("net.wiredtomato:farrow:$farrowVersion")!!)
}
```
